sourceAmbiguity: Receipt and status copy could branch independently by channel.
decisionTaken: Published a shared canonical status grammar for provisional, confirmed, pending review, awaiting more information, blocked, and settled states.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The patient should see one request system rather than separate channel products.
operationalRisk: Future channel copy could try to reintroduce bespoke status labels.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Update the contract and parity matrix before changing any channel-facing status copy.
